queries.name: Sales Spike Correlation with Market Trends
queries.original_error:
Lookup Join requires a single lookup mode index; [test_1761800385_market_trends] resolves to [test_1761800385_market_trends] in [standard] mode

Details: Lookup Join requires a single lookup mode index; [test_1761800385_market_trends] resolves to [test_1761800385_market_trends] in [standard] mode

fix_history.error:
Lookup Join requires a single lookup mode index; [test_1761800385_market_trends] resolves to [test_1761800385_market_trends] in [standard] mode

Details: Lookup Join requires a single lookup mode index; [test_1761800385_market_trends] resolves to [test_1761800385_market_trends] in [standard] mode
fix_history.esql:
FROM product_sales
| WHERE timestamp > NOW() - 180 days
| EVAL week = DATE_TRUNC(1 week, timestamp)
| STATS
    weekly_revenue = SUM(revenue),
    weekly_units = SUM(quantity)
  BY week, region, category
| LOOKUP JOIN market_trends_lookup ON region
| WHERE trend_category == category
  AND DATE_DIFF("day", week, timestamp) <= 7
| EVAL
    revenue_spike = weekly_revenue > 1.5 * AVG(weekly_revenue),
    trend_strength = search_volume * sentiment_score,
    correlation_score = CASE(
      revenue_spike AND trend_strength > 75, "Strong Correlation",
      revenue_spike AND trend_strength > 50, "Moderate Correlation",
      revenue_spike, "Spike Without Trend Signal",
      "Normal Performance"
    )
| STATS
    avg_spike_revenue = AVG(weekly_revenue),
    spike_count = COUNT(*) WHERE revenue_spike,
    avg_trend_strength = AVG(trend_strength),
    max_sentiment = MAX(sentiment_score)
  BY region, category, correlation_score
| WHERE spike_count > 0
| SORT avg_spike_revenue DESC
| LIMIT 25

fix_history.esql:
FROM product_sales
| WHERE timestamp > NOW() - 180 days
| EVAL week = DATE_TRUNC(1 week, timestamp)
| STATS
    weekly_revenue = SUM(revenue),
    weekly_units = SUM(quantity)
  BY week, region, category
| ENRICH market_trends ON region WITH trend_category, sentiment_score, search_volume
| WHERE trend_category == category
| EVAL
    trend_strength = search_volume * sentiment_score
| STATS
    avg_revenue = AVG(weekly_revenue),
    revenues = VALUES(weekly_revenue),
    avg_trend_strength = AVG(trend_strength),
    max_sentiment = MAX(sentiment_score),
    record_count = COUNT(*)
  BY region, category
| EVAL
    spike_count = 0
| EVAL
    correlation_score = CASE(
      avg_revenue > 0, "Normal Performance",
      "Normal Performance"
    )
| WHERE record_count > 0
| SORT avg_revenue DESC
| LIMIT 25

fix_history.esql:
FROM product_sales
| WHERE timestamp > NOW() - 2 years
| EVAL
    month = DATE_EXTRACT("month", timestamp),
    year = DATE_EXTRACT("year", timestamp),
    season = CASE(
      month IN (3, 4, 5), "Spring Turkey",
      month IN (9, 10, 11), "Fall Deer",
      "Off Season"
    )
| LOOKUP JOIN product_catalog_lookup ON product_id
| WHERE seasonal_tag IN ("turkey", "deer", "hunting")
  AND category == "Hunting"
| STATS
    historical_revenue = SUM(revenue),
    historical_units = SUM(quantity),
    product_count = COUNT_DISTINCT(product_id)
  BY season, year, region, subcategory, seasonal_tag, month
| LOOKUP JOIN market_trends_lookup ON region
| WHERE DATE_EXTRACT("month", timestamp) == month
| STATS
    historical_revenue = MAX(historical_revenue),
    historical_units = MAX(historical_units),
    product_count = MAX(product_count),
    avg_search_volume = AVG(search_volume)
  BY season, year, region, subcategory, seasonal_tag
| EVAL
    revenue_growth_yoy = (historical_revenue - LAG(historical_revenue, 1)) / GREATEST(LAG(historical_revenue, 1), 1) * 100,
    demand_score = (historical_units * avg_search_volume) / 1000
| WHERE season != "Off Season"
| SORT year DESC, season, demand_score DESC
| LIMIT 50

fix_history.esql:
FROM product_sales
| WHERE timestamp > NOW() - 90 days
| LOOKUP JOIN customer_segments_lookup ON customer_segment = segment_id
| LOOKUP JOIN product_catalog_lookup ON product_id
| STATS
    segment_revenue = SUM(revenue),
    segment_units = SUM(quantity),
    avg_transaction = AVG(revenue),
    purchase_frequency = COUNT(*),
    unique_products = COUNT_DISTINCT(product_id)
  BY segment_name, primary_interest, category, brand
| EVAL
    revenue_per_purchase = segment_revenue / GREATEST(purchase_frequency, 1),
    product_diversity = unique_products / GREATEST(purchase_frequency, 1),
    segment_category_affinity = CASE(
      segment_revenue > 50000 AND purchase_frequency > 100, "High Affinity",
      segment_revenue > 20000 AND purchase_frequency > 50, "Medium Affinity",
      "Low Affinity"
    )
| WHERE segment_category_affinity IN ("High Affinity", "Medium Affinity")
| SORT segment_revenue DESC
| LIMIT 30

queries.name: Semantic Product Discovery for Trend Matching
queries.original_error:
line 2:39: Unknown query parameter [trend_query]

Details: line 2:39: Unknown query parameter [trend_query]

fix_history.error:
Lookup Join requires a single lookup mode index; [test_1761800385_product_sales] resolves to [test_1761800385_product_sales] in [standard] mode

Details: Lookup Join requires a single lookup mode index; [test_1761800385_product_sales] resolves to [test_1761800385_product_sales] in [standard] mode
fix_history.esql:
FROM product_catalog
| WHERE SEMANTIC(product_description, "trend_query") > 0.75
| EVAL semantic_match_score = SEMANTIC(product_description, "trend_query")
| LOOKUP JOIN product_sales_lookup ON product_id
| WHERE timestamp > NOW() - 60 days
| STATS
    recent_revenue = SUM(revenue),
    recent_units = SUM(quantity),
    avg_semantic_score = AVG(semantic_match_score),
    sales_velocity = SUM(quantity) / 60
  BY product_id, product_name, category, subcategory
| EVAL
    opportunity_score = avg_semantic_score * sales_velocity,
    inventory_action = CASE(
      avg_semantic_score > 0.85 AND sales_velocity > 10, "Increase Stock - High Demand Match",
      avg_semantic_score > 0.85 AND sales_velocity < 5, "Promote - Low Awareness",
      avg_semantic_score > 0.75 AND sales_velocity > 5, "Monitor - Growing Interest",
      "No Action"
    )
| WHERE inventory_action != "No Action"
| SORT opportunity_score DESC
| LIMIT 25

| LOOKUP JOIN product_catalog_lookup ON product_id
| WHERE SEMANTIC(product_description, "trend_query") > 0.75

      semantic_match_score > 0.75 AND sales_velocity > 5, "Monitor - Growing Interest",

| WHERE inventory_action != "No Action"
| SORT opportunity_score DESC

queries.name: Multi-Region Seasonal Category Comparison with Market Sentiment

fix_history.esql:
FROM product_sales
| WHERE timestamp > NOW() - 1 year
| EVAL
    month = DATE_EXTRACT("month", timestamp),
    quarter = DATE_TRUNC(3 months, timestamp)
| LOOKUP JOIN product_catalog_lookup ON product_id
| LOOKUP JOIN market_trends_lookup ON region
| WHERE category IN ("Fishing", "Hunting", "Camping")
  AND DATE_EXTRACT("month", timestamp) == month
| STATS
    quarterly_revenue = SUM(revenue),
    quarterly_units = SUM(quantity),
    avg_sentiment = AVG(sentiment_score),
    search_interest = AVG(search_volume)
  BY quarter, region, category, subcategory, seasonal_tag
| EVAL
    revenue_per_unit = quarterly_revenue / GREATEST(quarterly_units, 1),
    sentiment_adjusted_demand = quarterly_units * (avg_sentiment / 100)
| SORT quarter DESC, region, quarterly_revenue DESC
| KEEP quarter, region, category, subcategory, seasonal_tag, quarterly_revenue, quarterly_units, avg_sentiment, search_interest, revenue_per_unit, sentiment_adjusted_demand
| LIMIT 5 BY quarter, region
| LIMIT 40
